name: Cappuccino Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all wet ingredients together and beat with an electric mixer for 4 minutes.
2. Mix all dry ingredients together and add to the wet mixture, mixing well.
3. Spread the batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
5. Coffee Kahlua Cream Glaze: Beat all ingredients until stiff and spread over the cool cake.
